MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Lourdes Sainez, is present.
Attorney, Brenda Keith Cruz, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jocelyn Ryder, is present.
Attorney, Matthew Gale , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-25-2010 is vacated.
